expected_path_note: Concession financed by public funds (state subsidies) doing construction -> NOT excluded -> qualifies via business revenues -> siap
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 06 – Concession Operator Paid With Public Funds Power Plant
activities: Energia Publica S.a r.l. holds a concession to build and operate a thermal power plant for the national energy ministry of Equatorial Guinea. Unlike a self-financed concession, the construction phase is paid through state subsidies and milestone payments from the national budget; the company's accounts show that these public payments make up around 85% of its revenues during the construction years. The company employs its own engineering teams for the civil works in Malabo.
origin_of_assets: Shareholder capital and milestone payments under the concession agreement.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Assets largely consist of the plant under construction and concession rights.
